sync.template: Run bun run module:sync to sync all modules, then verify that symlinks are correct.

build:prod.template: Run production build: bun run build:prod (fetches modules, syncs them, and builds)

check.template: Run type checking and linting with bun run check and bun run lint. Fix any issues found.

migrate.template: Create and run database migrations: bun run db:migration:create --name <name> --module <module> --reversible, then edit the SQL file, then bun run db:migrate. NEVER run drizzle-kit generate.
